name: Shrimp Scampi
recipeIngredient: A bed of fresh colorful lettuce
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the shrimp dry.
2. In a bowl, combine all the spices and olive oil and toss well.
3. Arrange over lettuce and garnish with artichoke hearts and/or celery.
4. Serve with hot bread and soft cheese (room temperature).
